name: Magic, Memory & Curiosity (MMC) fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds004182) of 50 participants watching naturalistic magic-trick videos during fMRI. Designed to study curiosity, surprise, prediction error, and memory in a rich naturalistic setting.
citation: Meliss S, et al. (2024). The Magic, Memory, and Curiosity (MMC) Dataset. Scientific Data, 11, 1009.
